headline: IRGC set to benefit from Iran sanctions relief under U.S. deal - Reuters
summary: Investing.com -- Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) could emerge as a major beneficiary of any sanctions relief granted under a future agreement between Washington and Tehran, according to an exclusive Reuters report on Saturday, citing four senior Iranian sources.
